name: blondy
prompt: Vertical 9:16 iPhone front-camera selfie. An attractive blonde woman in her mid-20s, polished influencer aesthetic — natural makeup with subtle gloss, glowing healthy skin, long honey-blonde hair tousled and slightly messy. Wearing a fitted white V-neck ribbed tank top, gold chain necklace resting at collar, hint of natural feminine silhouette. Sitting cross-legged on a bed with white sheets, soft morning sunlight from a window to her right, cozy bedroom in the background — slightly out of focus warm tones, hint of a plant and a candle. Confident half-smile, direct eye contact with the camera, holding her phone in selfie position. iPhone selfie aesthetic — natural skin texture, subtle grain. Casual TikTok creator vibe, no studio lighting, no logos, no text.
